rulings.Case Title: SOLIDA MAHAR et al VS. ALLIS-CHALMERS CORPORATION PRODUCT LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT EMERSON ELECTRIC CO. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Off Calendar, per April 6, 2009 dismissal. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs;
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 2, DEFENDANT RANJAN CHARAN'S Motion For Award Of Attorney's Fees And Costs. Motion for award of attorney fees and costs is granted. Charan is the prevailing party. CCP section 1032. Settlement agreement provides for reasonable attorneys' fees to prevailing party. CCP section 1033.5 allows for costs that are reasonably necessary to the conduct of litigation. One trip to San Francisco was not necessary. $971.82 awarded. =(302/CWW/JW)
Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Off Calendar, per dismissal. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH VS. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY DBA FIRST
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. The Complaint fails to state a cause of action aganst Deutsche Bank. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: ALEKSANDR RABINOVICH VS. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY DBA FIRST
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 11, DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE. Motion to Strike is off calendar as moot in view of Court's ruling on demurrer. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: SAM GLEASON et al VS. SEEMA HOSSAIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 15, DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA Re-Notice Of Demurrer To First Amended Complaint. Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the eleventh cause of action for negligent infliction of emotional distress. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the ninth cause of action for false advertising. Remainder of demurrer is overruled. =(302/CWW/VC)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 13, PETITIONER ARIANE DOBRIN'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And For Appointment Of Neutral Arbitrator. Parties to comply with CCP section 1281.6 and provide a list of potential arbitrators to the Court by June 1, 2009. Motion is continued to June 10, 2009. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: INDYMAC BANK, F.S.B. VS. ESTEBAN POLONSKI et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, May 8, 2009, line 14, DEFENDANT SUE KUYPER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Absent opposition, motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant Kuyper is a tenant at the subject property who was not served with a notice which complied with the San Francisco Rent Stabilization and Arbitration Ordinance. Plaintiff raises no triable issue of fact. =(302/CWW/PB)
